name: LMJ Auto Motors Sales
description_short: San Antonio used car dealer specializing in lease returns and trade-ins, offering financing through multiple lenders for all credit types.
description_long:
LMJ Auto Motors Sales is a San Antonio, Texas used car dealership founded September 28, 2015, operating as a sole proprietorship under General Manager Luis Nente. Located at 2733 Blanco Rd, Unit A, the small lot serves budget-conscious buyers in the greater San Antonio metro area. The business holds a C+ BBB rating and is not BBB-accredited — a single complaint on file went unanswered. No CDFI, NFCC, HUD-approved, or other financial or dealer-specific certifications have been identified for this operation.

LMJ specializes in pre-owned vehicles sourced through relationships in the dealer community — specifically lease returns and new car trade-ins acquired at below-retail cost. The dealership passes those acquisition savings to buyers, positioning itself as a value-oriented alternative to larger lots. Typical inventory sits around 17 vehicles, with an average price of approximately $13,002, an average model year of around 2013, and average mileage of roughly 123,626 miles. Financing is arranged through multiple third-party lenders with stated flexibility for buyers across all credit profiles, including those with challenged credit histories. Trade-ins are accepted.

LMJ's strongest differentiator is its customer experience. Across Google (5.0/5 from 59 reviews), Birdeye (4.9/5 from 49 reviews), and CARFAX (4/5 from 4 reviews), buyers consistently praise the staff's transparency, friendliness, and speed of transaction. The small-lot format works in the dealership's favor — buyers deal directly with knowledgeable staff in a low-pressure environment rather than navigating a sprawling, commission-heavy operation. Sourcing through dealer networks rather than auctions is cited as the mechanism behind competitive pricing on relatively recent trade-ins.

LMJ Auto Motors Sales is a legitimate budget used car option in San Antonio, but buyers should weigh real limitations: inventory is small and rotates, so selection is narrow at any given time. The C+ BBB rating and failure to respond to a filed complaint raise questions about post-sale dispute resolution. Vehicles skew older and higher-mileage given the price point — buyers seeking lower-mileage or newer inventory will need to look elsewhere. No return policy, certified pre-owned designation, or on-site service center has been identified. This listing sits in a consumer finance directory primarily because the dealership facilitates auto financing for all credit types; the core business is vehicle sales, not lending.

pricing.guarantee_details: No money-back guarantee identified. Contact provider for details.

pros: Exceptionally high customer satisfaction — 5.0/5 on Google (59 reviews) and 4.9/5 on Birdeye (49 reviews)
Dealer network sourcing of lease returns and trade-ins enables below-market vehicle pricing averaging ~$13,002
Works with multiple third-party lenders accepting all credit types, including challenged credit histories
Small lot (approx. 17 vehicles) means personalized, low-pressure buying experience with direct staff access
Established in 2015 with over a decade of community presence in San Antonio
Listed on major third-party platforms (CARFAX, CarGurus, Yelp) providing additional transparency and review verification
cons: BBB rating of C+ and failure to respond to a filed complaint raises concerns about post-sale dispute resolution
Inventory is small (~17 vehicles) and limited in selection at any given time
Average vehicle age (~2013 model year) and mileage (~123,626 miles) reflect the economy price point — not suited for buyers seeking newer or lower-mileage inventory
No identified return policy, certified pre-owned program, on-site service center, or warranty details
best_for: San Antonio-area buyers on a budget seeking affordable pre-owned vehicles under $15,000
Buyers with challenged, thin, or varied credit histories who need flexible multi-lender financing options
First-time car buyers who prefer a low-pressure, personalized small-dealership environment
Buyers comfortable with older, higher-mileage vehicles in exchange for below-market pricing
diagnosis: LMJ Auto Motors Sales is best suited for budget-conscious San Antonio buyers — especially those with imperfect credit — who prioritize low purchase price and a friendly buying experience over broad inventory selection or post-sale support infrastructure. The main caveat is the C+ BBB rating and unresolved complaint history, which suggest limited recourse if something goes wrong after the sale; buyers should inspect vehicles thoroughly and clarify any warranty terms before purchasing.
services: New car trade-in resales sourced through dealer network
Auto financing facilitation through multiple third-party lenders
Financing for all credit types and scores, including challenged credit
Below-market pricing via dealer community sourcing relationships
